## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (and pass locally : `python -m pytest tests/`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing (README.md / MEMORY_PROTOCOL.md / docstrings)
- [ ] Coding conventions followed (see CONTRIBUTING.md — type hints, UTF-8, no hardcoded paths)
- [ ] Commit message uses conventional prefix (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `test:`, `refactor:`, `chore:`)
